# Adalberto Silveira Napoles — Senior Software Engineer

> Portfolio: https://adalbertosilveiranapoles.dev
> Contact: adalbertosn1982@gmail.com
> LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/adalbertosilveiranapoles
> GitHub: https://github.com/silveiraSoft
> Location: Hialeah, FL 33015 (open to remote)

## Summary

Senior Software Engineer with 18+ years of experience designing and delivering enterprise-grade, cloud-native applications. Specialized in Java (8–25), Spring Boot, Spring WebFlux, and event-driven microservices on AWS — handling 50,000+ daily transactions at 99.9% uptime in production financial and identity-validation platforms.

Active AI practitioner: built an autonomous job-application agent using Python and the Claude/Anthropic API, and an AWS infrastructure monitor powered by Amazon Bedrock Agents with natural-language health queries.

Available for: Senior Software Engineer · Principal Engineer · Staff Engineer · Backend · Full-Stack · AI/ML Engineering roles

## Core Skills

- **Languages**: Java 8–25, Python 3.10+, TypeScript, PHP
- **Frameworks**: Spring Boot, Spring WebFlux, Project Reactor, Next.js 15, React
- **Cloud**: AWS (Lambda, EC2, ECS, Bedrock, API Gateway, CloudFront, S3, SNS, SQS, DynamoDB, CloudWatch, CDK)
- **AI/ML**: Amazon Bedrock Agents, Claude API (Anthropic), MCP connectors, Prompt Engineering
- **Architecture**: Microservices, Event-Driven, CQRS, Saga Pattern, Clean Architecture, DDD
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, DynamoDB
- **DevOps**: Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS CDK, GitHub Actions, Grafana

## Featured Projects

### AWS Monitor Agent
- Chat-based AWS health monitoring powered by Amazon Bedrock Agents + Claude 3.5 Haiku
- 2 CDK stacks (AwsMonitorAgentStack + AwsMonitorFrontendStack), fully serverless
- 11 action groups covering EC2, Lambda, CloudWatch, Logs Insights, X-Ray, ALB, CloudTrail, SSM
- Multi-region support, 326 automated tests, < $0.02/month at rest
- Source: https://github.com/silveiraSoft/aws-monitor
- Article: https://adalbertosilveiranapoles.dev/blog/aws-monitor-bedrock-agents

### JobHunter AI Agent
- Fully autonomous job application pipeline running every Wednesday at 10am
- Claude Haiku personalizes resume per job description (STAR-method, Match% scoring, ATS-optimized)
- LinkedIn Easy Apply automation via Claude in Chrome; Gmail HTML digest via MCP
- 6-phase pipeline: pre-flight → job search → resume gen → apply → email → live dashboard
- Source: https://github.com/silveiraSoft/agent-linkedin-candidate
- Article: https://adalbertosilveiranapoles.dev/blog/autonomous-job-agent-claude-ai

## Experience

- **3HTP Cloud Services** (2022–present) — Senior Java Backend Engineer. Built Talos identity-validation platform (voice biometrics, facial recognition, OTP) for banking; Distributed Complaints Management System on AWS SNS/SQS; AWS Monitor Bedrock Agent.
- **Cooper Tec** (2021–2022) — Full-Stack Developer. Document Management System with Spring WebFlux + Angular; open-source PHP library contributions (brunoconte3/dev-utils).
- **UniCesumar** (2019–2021) — Backend Java Developer. Academic management systems in Java/Spring for 300K+ students across Brazil.
- **University of Angola (UCAN)** (2014–2019) — Software Engineer. University information systems, web portals.
- **ETECSA** (2007–2013) — Software Engineer. Telecommunications billing and operations systems.

## Education

- M.Sc. Business Informatics — CUJAE (Havana, Cuba), 2013
- B.Sc. Computer Sciences — University of Santiago de Cuba, 2006

- AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional
- AWS Certified Developer – Associate
- Oracle Certified Professional Java SE 11
- Spring Professional Certification
